name: qa-example-content
description: QA test content and local container environments

scripts.wb:connect: if [ -z "$GITHUB_TOKEN" ]; then echo 'Error: GITHUB_TOKEN not set'; echo ''; echo 'Run with: GITHUB_TOKEN=xxx npm run wb:connect'; echo 'Or export: export GITHUB_TOKEN=xxx'; exit 1; fi && cd dockerfiles/wb-local && ./connect.sh
